user.title: Majestic Pool
user.description: Quick setup. Advanced protocol settings are available later in integration options.

data_description.address: Bluetooth MAC address of the Majestic controller (format XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX).

init.title: Majestic Pool options
init.description: Advanced BLE protocol settings. Keep defaults unless you are actively reverse engineering.

data_description.temperature_command: Temperature read command. Keep 2 (0x02) unless you need custom behavior.
data_description.connect_on_demand: Connect only when an action/read is needed, then disconnect, to reduce physical panel lockups.
data_description.enable_pairing_probe: Check pairing characteristic before sending commands.
data_description.pairing_timeout: Maximum wait for valid pairing state.
data_description.device_name_prefix: BLE name prefix used if configured address fails. Full name is not required.
